name: convert_vrscene_folder
description: Batch-convert every .vrscene file in a folder and optionally export the generated materials to a .blend library.

folder_path.description: Absolute path to a folder containing .vrscene files.

output_blend_path.description: Optional output .blend library path for the generated materials.

reset_scene.description: Whether to reset the current Blender scene to an empty homefile before conversion.

mapping_group_name.description: Optional shader node group used as the custom triplanar/randomizer mapping equivalent.

group_socket_map.description: Optional semantic-to-socket-name mapping override for the custom mapping group interface.

replace_existing.description: Whether to overwrite Blender materials that already exist with the same names.

use_fake_user.description: Whether converted materials should keep a fake user so they survive file cleanup.

returns.description: Batch conversion report with per-file results, exported material names, warnings, and output library metadata.
